caption: A man named Basil Chapman is featured in a studio setting against a solid dark blue background. He is wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-down shirt over a grey t-shirt and is smiling throughout the clip. He holds a gold trophy with a red ribbon in his right hand. Across the bottom of the screen, a blue banner identifies him as "Basil Chapman" and lists "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022". Overlaid white text appears in the center of the screen, expanding in a sequence. It begins with the word "STAY", then changes to "STAY ON TOP OF STOCK", and finally becomes "STAY ON TOP OF STOCK PATTERNS" for the remainder of the sequence. As the text grows, the man maintains his cheerful expression and posture, holding the trophy aloft.
